props.name: className
props.description: A string of all className you want applied to the base component.

props.name: lg
props.type: {{ cols: 'auto' | number | string } | { gutter: number | string } | { gutterX: number | string } | { gutterY: number | string }}
props.description: The number of columns/offset/order on large devices (<1200px).

props.name: md
props.type: {{ cols: 'auto' | number | string } | { gutter: number | string } | { gutterX: number | string } | { gutterY: number | string }}
props.description: The number of columns/offset/order on medium devices (<992px).

props.name: sm
props.type: {{ cols: 'auto' | number | string } | { gutter: number | string } | { gutterX: number | string } | { gutterY: number | string }}
props.description: The number of columns/offset/order on small devices (<768px).

props.name: xl
props.type: {{ cols: 'auto' | number | string } | { gutter: number | string } | { gutterX: number | string } | { gutterY: number | string }}
props.description: The number of columns/offset/order on X-Large devices (<1400px).

props.name: xs
props.type: {{ cols: 'auto' | number | string } | { gutter: number | string } | { gutterX: number | string } | { gutterY: number | string }}
props.description: The number of columns/offset/order on extra small devices (<576px).

props.name: xxl
props.type: {{ cols: 'auto' | number | string } | { gutter: number | string } | { gutterX: number | string } | { gutterY: number | string }}
